name: Chorizo Vegetable Stuffing for Burritos
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Cacique Brand Chorizo (beef or pork)
12 ounces Cacique brand Enchilado cheese, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in salted water for about 8 minutes until tender, then drain.
2. Cook the chorizo and drain excess fat.
3. Sauté the green bell peppers, Roma tomatoes, onions, and carrots in a pan with the chorizo until vegetables are cooked through.
4. Add the diced potatoes and chopped cilantro to the sautéed vegetables.
5. Mix in the crumbled Enchilado cheese and Crema Agria.
6. Stuff burritos with the mixture, sprinkling additional Enchilado cheese on top before serving.
